title: LATERN 6Pcs Christmas Drawstring Gift Bags, 45CM x 30CM Holly Leaves Gift Bags Reusable Non-Woven Party Bags with Handle & Satin Ribbon Drawstring & Tags for Xmas Gift Wrapping Presents Decorations
features: [High quality] Made of high quality non-woven fabric, comfortable to touch, strong and durable, sewing reinforced edge, not easy to tear and deform, not easy to wear and fade, washable and reusable

[Christmas holly leaves] Each gift bag is printed a vivid holly leaves and red berries on the front and back, making it visually appealing and enjoyable from all perspectives, create a winter holiday atmosphere

[Easy to use] With strong handles and expandable bottom, sturdy and leak-proof, can store large gifts; Comes with red ribbon drawstring and holiday gift tag, to add a personalized touch to holiday gift

[Size] Large size: 45cm x 30cm /18inch x 12inch, just put the gift into the bag, tighten the ribbon drawstring, and then tie the gift tag, suitable for those who like to give gifts but don't like to wrap gifts people

[Applicable] Perfect for wrapping most small and medium-sized holiday gifts, Great for Christmas Eve Boxes, Christmas birthday party, Christmas kids party, Christmas wedding, Christmas party or any other Christmas themed party etc
description: LATERN 6Pcs 45CM x 30CM Holly Leaves Christmas Gift Bags are perfect for wrapping most small and medium-sized holiday gifts, Great for Christmas Eve Boxes, Christmas birthday party, Christmas kids party, Christmas wedding, Christmas party or any other Christmas themed party etc! Feature: - Made of high quality non-woven fabric, sewing reinforced edge, not easy to tear and deform, not easy to wear and fade. - Each gift bag is printed a vivid holly leaves and red berries on the front and back, create a winter holiday atmosphere. - With strong handles and expandable bottom, sturdy and leak-proof, can store large gifts. - Comes with red ribbon drawstring and holiday gift tag, to add a personalized touch to holiday gift. - Large size: 45cm x 30cm, just put the gift into the bag, tighten the ribbon drawstring, and then tie the gift tag. Specifications: Size: 45cm x 30cm Material: Non-woven Color: White Pattern: Holly leaves and red berries Drawstring: Yes Packing included: 6 x Christmas gift bags 6 x Gift tags
